title: Release Descriptor
description: Schema for a release descriptor, posted to an internal API as part of abstract delivery targets.

descriptor_id.description: Unique identifier for this release descriptor

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the descriptor was created

prompt_digest.description: The canonical digest of the prompt package being released

prompt_version.description: Semantic version of the prompt package being released, if applicable

environment.description: The environment this release is targeting (e.g., prod, staging)

signatures.description: Digital signatures ensuring the authenticity of the release

key_id.description: Identifier of the key used to sign the descriptor

metadata.description: Additional metadata related to the release descriptor
